x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Fronts the DOB legacy application layer (BIS Web, DOB NOW, eFiling) and its nightly Socrata batch dump with one agent contract, and adds the net-new write workflow: filing a DOB NOW permit application.

server.name: io.nyc.dob
server.title: NYC Department of Buildings
server.description: Agent-native access to the NYC Department of Buildings — buildings (BIN/BBL), job filings, permits, DOB & ECB violations, complaints, and certificates of occupancy. Consolidates the browser-only legacy app layer (BIS Web, DOB NOW, eFiling) and the nightly NYC Open Data extract behind one owned surface, and adds a write workflow to file and track a DOB NOW permit application.
server.instructions: Use find_buildings / get_building to resolve a property by BIN, BBL, or address — the building is the join spine for everything else. find_job_filings and get_job_filing cover DOB job applications; find_permits covers issued work permits; find_violations spans both DOB (BIS) and ECB (OATH) violations (filter by violationClass); find_complaints covers 311-sourced building complaints; find_certificates_of_occupancy returns C of O records. All read tools are backed by a nightly batch extract, so data can lag the live BIS/DOB NOW systems by up to a day. file_permit_application and submit_permit_application (net-new) mutate state and require an authenticated user — confirm all filing details with the user before creating or submitting.

tools.name: find_buildings
tools.title: Find Buildings
tools.description: Search NYC buildings by borough, BBL, block/lot, or free text (address). Returns BIN-keyed building records.

tools.name: get_building
tools.title: Get Building
tools.description: Fetch a building by BIN (Building Identification Number), with its geography spine and tax lot.

tools.name: find_job_filings
tools.title: Find Job Filings
tools.description: Search DOB job application filings by borough, BIN, job type, status, or date range. Fronts BIS + DOB NOW filings.

tools.name: get_job_filing
tools.title: Get Job Filing
tools.description: Fetch a single DOB job application filing by job number.

tools.name: find_permits
tools.title: Find Permits
tools.description: Search issued DOB work permits by borough, BIN, job number, permit type, status, or date range.

tools.name: find_violations
tools.title: Find Violations
tools.description: Search DOB and ECB/OATH violations by borough, BIN, class (DOB or ECB), status, or date range.

tools.name: find_complaints
tools.title: Find Complaints
tools.description: Search building/construction complaints received by DOB by BIN, status, category, or date range.

tools.name: find_certificates_of_occupancy
tools.title: Find Certificates of Occupancy
tools.description: Search Certificates of Occupancy by borough, BIN, job number, or issue type (Final/Temporary).

tools.name: file_permit_application
tools.title: File Permit Application
tools.description: File a new DOB NOW: Build permit application as a draft. NET-NEW workflow with no equivalent today (DOB NOW is browser-only). Requires an authenticated user. Mutates state — confirm all details with the user first.

tools.name: submit_permit_application
tools.title: Submit Permit Application
tools.description: Update a draft permit application or advance it to 'Submitted' to lodge the DOB NOW filing for review. Requires an authenticated user. Mutates state — confirm with the user before submitting.
